overall.description: Aerial drone footage circling above a futuristic cyberpunk city intersection at night, featuring two large holographic koi fish (one orange, one blue) swimming in opposite directions around a circular plaza. The scene is rendered in a game engine, showcasing dense urban architecture with glowing neon advertisements, glass skyscrapers, and sparse vehicle traffic moving along the radiating roads below.

large blue holographic koi fish swimming counter-clockwise around the plaza perimeter

tall modern glass towers with illuminated windows surrounding the plaza
multiple highways extending outward from the circular intersection with moving vehicle lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a top-down aerial view of a futuristic circular plaza surrounded by glass skyscrapers. Two massive holographic fish—one orange and one blue—swim in opposite directions around the plaza's glowing teal ring. Sparse traffic moves along the radiating roads while the camera slowly rotates counter-clockwise, revealing the dense urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular plaza with Kang Tao corporate building visible

agents.ego_description: continuing aerial rotation showing the northern side of the plaza and surrounding corporate buildings

blue holographic fish swimming along the right side of the plaza toward the bottom

entered.detail: tall corporate skyscraper with prominent Kang Tao signage and distinctive orange lighting accents

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its counter-clockwise rotation, the Kang Tao corporate building emerges on the left with its prominent illuminated signage. The holographic fish continue their circular paths, now positioned on opposite sides of the frame. The surrounding neon-lit skyscrapers create a dense urban canyon around the circular intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular plaza with western digital billboards

events.description: orange and blue holographic fish pass each other on opposite sides of the plaza while swimming in opposite directions

blue holographic fish swimming toward the eastern side of the plaza with glowing fins

entered.detail: tall digital advertisement screens with colorful neon graphics and corporate logos

segments.scene_description: The camera rotation reveals the western side of the plaza featuring large digital billboards with vibrant neon graphics. The two holographic fish pass each other on opposite sides of the circular intersection, their glowing forms creating light trails against the dark cityscape. The surrounding skyscrapers display a mix of commercial advertisements and illuminated windows as the rotation continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous counter-clockwise aerial rotation above a futuristic circular plaza, transitioning from a top-down perspective to a sweeping view of a dense cyberpunk urban canyon. It begins with a high-angle view of two massive holographic fish, one orange and one blue, swimming in opposite directions around a glowing teal ring while sparse traffic flows along radiating roads. As the camera rotates, the perspective shifts to reveal the Kang Tao corporate building and its prominent illuminated signage emerging on the left, framing the holographic fish as they move to opposite sides of the screen. The scene then expands to uncover the western side of the plaza, where vibrant digital billboards and neon graphics light up the surrounding skyscrapers. Finally, the rotation culminates as the two glowing fish pass each other over the intersection, leaving shimmering light trails against the backdrop of commercial advertisements and illuminated windows.
